lloomr 0.1.0.9000

    • Changelog

Find documents needing another concept-induction iteration

Source: R/refine.R
loop_docs.Rd

Implements the LLooM loop operator: identifies documents that are either not covered by any concept or covered only by generic concepts (those matching at least half of all documents), and returns them for another round of concept generation.

Usage

loop_docs(
  score_df,
  text_col = "text",
  id_col,
  threshold = 1,
  generic_threshold = 0.5
)

Arguments

score_df

Output of score_concepts().

text_col, id_col

Column names for document text and IDs (text_col should name the text column in score_df, i.e. "text").

threshold

Minimum score counting as a match. Default 1.

generic_threshold

Fraction of documents a concept must match to count as generic for coverage purposes. Default 0.5 (upstream).

Value

A tibble of documents (id_col, text_col) to feed into the next iteration, or NULL if iteration should stop (every document would be included again, or none would).

Examples

# Doc 1 matches the concept; docs 2-3 are uncovered -> returned for
# another round
score_df <- data.frame(
  doc_id = c("1", "2", "3"),
  text = c("covered doc", "uncovered doc", "another uncovered"),
  concept_id = "c1", concept_name = "Concept",
  score = c(1, 0, 0)
)
loop_docs(score_df, "text", "doc_id")
#> # A tibble: 2 × 2
#>   doc_id text             
#>   <chr>  <chr>            
#> 1 2      uncovered doc    
#> 2 3      another uncovered
